message:
fix(test): update migration test to expect V14 FTS contentless migration

The build_cass_migrations_applies_combined_v13 test expected only [13]
but V14 (FTS contentless) was added to the migration runner, so fresh
databases now apply both migrations: [13, 14] with current version 14.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
